since_last: 31% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.17%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.71% · Gold -0.99% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 31% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.17%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.17%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at -10.68%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.04%, WDAY +4.10%, INTU +3.24%, META +2.87%, EQIX +2.41%. Laggards: INTC -10.68%, AMBA -9.97%, TER -9.54%, MRVL -8.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.82% at $151.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
